summary: Validated Branch Orders dialog (/branch-orders) end-to-end: packaging unit indicator + persistence + fulfillment. Both frontend UI flow and backend create+fulfill APIs verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: BranchOrders.js is large (~1158 lines) — consider splitting the 'New Order' dialog into its own component for maintainability.

Some console errors observed unrelated to this feature: 'Failed to fetch branches' on the home page (call-center widget) and an ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED for a localhost call (Print Agent / biometric) — both expected per test_credentials.md but consider gating these fetches behind feature flags to reduce console noise.

GET /api/packaging-materials and /api/manufactured-products return 'Not authenticated' (403) without a token but the home page tries to call them before redirect — confirm guards in caller components.

success_rate.backend: 100% (all 4 API checks passed: list, create persistence, fulfill, branch-packaging-inventory)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (dialog opens, unit indicator correct, packaging total, grand total, submit + toast + order list refresh all working)

seed_data_creation: Pre-existing seed used: 'لحم برغر' (manufactured, 100 حبة, unit_cost 6411.68), 'علبة برغر' (packaging, 500 قطعة, 250 IQD), branch 'الفرع الرئيسي' (76f56acc-...). No re-seed required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Orders dialog testids: new-order-btn, select-branch, branch-order-qty, branch-order-add-product, branch-order-pkg-qty, branch-order-pkg-unit, branch-order-add-pkg. Product/packaging Select triggers have no testids; locate via role='combobox' text 'اختر منتج...' / 'اختر مادة تغليف...'. The /api/branch-requests POST is exercised via the dialog submit; GET returns the persisted record with packaging_items + total_cost. Fulfill endpoint: POST /api/branch-requests/{id}/fulfill; on success it deducts from packaging_materials.quantity (and increments transferred_to_branches) and inserts/updates branch-packaging-inventory. branch-packaging-inventory _id (ObjectId) is now correctly excluded — endpoint returns 200 with clean JSON.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature working as designed. Verified end-to-end values: created request id 7d1d85ac-cf52-4a08-b210-e5a404a959d1, total_cost=69116.8, packaging_items[0]={علبة برغر, qty=20, cost_per_unit=250, total_cost=5000}, items[0]={لحم برغر, qty=10, cost_per_unit=6411.68, total_cost=64116.8}. After fulfill: packaging_materials.علبة برغر qty 500→480 (transferred 0→20), manufactured.لحم برغر qty 100→90, branch-packaging-inventory shows علبة برغر qty=20 for the receiving branch.

evidence.ui_dialog_text: علبة برغر (20 قطعة × IQD 250) → IQD 5,000 ; إجمالي التغليف: IQD 5,000 ; لحم برغر (10.00 حبة × IQD 6,412) → IQD 64,117 ; الإجمالي: IQD 69,117 (rounded display of 69,116.8)
evidence.branch_packaging_inventory_after_fulfill: [{packaging_material_name: 'علبة برغر', quantity: 20.0, branch_id: 76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f}] HTTP 200 (ObjectId serialization fix verified)
